name: codex-switcher
description: Profile-based account switcher for Codex CLI and Codex App without modifying upstream source.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Codex App/CLI accounts via CODEX_HOME profiles.
interface.longDescription: Use isolated profile directories for Codex CLI and restart Codex App into a selected profile without patching Codex source code.
defaultPrompt: Create a new Codex profile for my work account.
Switch Codex CLI to the personal profile.
Restart Codex App with the selected account profile.
